adjusted.reasoning: Coin-flip semi. Model (Elo) narrowly favours Spain (44% away) but the 90-min market favours France (~FRA 40/draw 30/ESP 30 de-vigged; FRA -150 to advance), and the market track has out-predicted the model all tournament -> anchored to market. France unbeaten in 7, Mbappe leads Golden Boot (8g+3a) and is 'completely fine' after the ankle knock; no suspensions (yellows wiped for last four). Tchouameni a game-time decision (thigh) - Kone deputises, already priced. Spain have not conceded all tournament but Nico Williams questionable, and Yamal only recently back to full sharpness. Tight, low-scoring, decided by a moment - predicted 1-0 France.

factors.factor: Consensus FRA +135 / draw +210 / ESP +225; FRA -150 to advance (de-vig ~40/30/30)
Mbappe 'completely fine' after ankle knock, leads Golden Boot 8g+3a; no France suspensions (yellows wiped)
Spain no goals conceded all tournament; Nico Williams questionable; Yamal recently back

posted_to.note: SF1 matchday bet. PROTECT (rank 1/34, lead +9), k=0.3 -> contest pick == EP-max = 1:0 (EP 1.85 on adjusted 40/30/30). Coin-flip semi anchored to market (France fav to advance) over Elo (Spain narrow fav). ENG-ARG left for 2026-07-15 cycle.
